Motion To Vacate Voluntary Dismissal
Off Calendar Oct-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FARMERS SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Vacate Voluntary Dismissal Pursuant to CCP section 473.

Grant. No opposition filed.

The Court will sign the proposed order included with the moving papers.
